name: The Way of Peace
text: Interrupt: When this province is broken, choose up to 3 characters – honor each of those characters.

name: The Roar of the Lioness
text: X is equal to half the amount of honor in your honor pool, rounded up.

name: Cycle of Vengeance
text: Interrupt: When this province is broken, choose a character – place 1 fate on that character and honor it.

name: Silent Skirmisher
text: Action: During a conflict, sacrifice another character – this character gets +2 [mil] until the end of the conflict.

name: Master of Jade
text:
Keeper role only.
Action: Lose 2 honor. Choose a character – place 1 fate on that character.

name: Daidoji Uji
text:
While this character is honored, you may play each card underneath it as if it were in your hand.
Reaction: After this character enters play – search your conflict deck for 4 cards and place them underneath this character facedown (out of play). When this character leaves play, remove each facedown card underneath it from the game.

name: Perfect Land Believer
text: While this character is ordinary, it gets +2 [mil] and +2 [pol].

name: Commander of the Legions
text:
Each other  character you control gets +1 [mil].
During the fate phase, if you have at least 5 more honor than an opponent, fate cannot be removed from  characters you control with printed cost 3 or lower.

name: Steward of Cryptic Lore
text:
Dire – This character gets +3[pol]. (This character is dire when it has no fate on it.)
Action: During an [earth] conflict, select one – the attacked province gets +3 strength or -3 strength until the end of the conflict.

name: Guardian Dōjō
text: Characters played from adjacent provinces enter play honored and you cannot place fate on them when they are played.

name: Shoju's Diviner
text: Dire – This character gains: "Action: Look at the top 8 cards of your conflict deck. Then, discard any number of those cards and put the rest back on top in any order". (This character is dire when it has no fate on it.)

name: Nimble Noyan
text:
Keeper role only.
Dire – While this character is participating in a conflict, bowed participating characters contribute their skill toward the resolution of the conflict. (This character is dire when it has no fate on it.)

name: Reserve Tents
text: Action: During a conflict, choose a character you control – move that character to the conflict. (Limit twice per round.)

name: Darkness Rising
text:
Water role only.
This card's fate cost can only be paid for with fate on characters you control.
Action: During a conflict, dishonor a (friendly) participating character – bow each participating character with lower [mil] skill than that of the dishonored character.

name: Raze to the Ground
text:
Earth role only.
Reaction: After you win a [mil] conflict against a non-stronghold province, dishonor a participating (friendly) character and break a faceup (friendly) province – break the attacked province.

name: Shoshi ni Kie
text:
Water role only.
Action: Reveal a (friendly) facedown province. Choose an ordinary character – ready that character.

name: Under Amaterasu's Gaze
text:
Attach to an unbroken province. Limit 1 Battlefield attachment per province.
During conflicts at attached province, increase the cost for each player to play each card from their hand by 1, unless that player has at least 5 more honor than their opponent.

name: Unhallow
text:
This card's fate cost can only be paid for with fate on characters you control.
Attach to an unbroken province you control.
Attached province gets +3 strength.
As an additional cost to declare 1 or more defenders during a conflict at attached province, you must lose 1 honor.

name: Messenger of Misfortune
text: Courtesy. (When this character leaves play, gain 1 fate.)

name: Shape the Flesh
text:
This card's fate cost can only be paid for with fate on characters you control.
Attached character gains covert and cannot be honored.

name: Shadow Steed
text:
This card's fate cost can only be paid for with fate on characters you control.
Ancestral.
Attached character gains the Cavalry trait.
Action: If attached character has no fate on it, lose 1 honor – ready attached character.

name: Curse of Misfortune
text: Each other attachment on attached character gains restricted.
